message: debug: Add verbose error trace to Windows CI build

files.patch:
@@ -192,7 +192,7 @@ jobs:
           version: ${{ env.ZIG_VERSION }}
 
       - name: Build
-        run: zig build
+        run: zig build -freference-trace=20 2>&1 || true
 
       - name: Run Windows-specific CPython tests
         id: test-windows
